name: Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor
description: A protein that when mutated drives uncontrolled cell division

name: Breast Cancer Type 1 Susceptibility Protein
description: A tumor suppressor protein involved in DNA repair

name: Angiotensin-Converting Enzyme 2
description: The entry point for the SARS-CoV-2 virus into human cells

name: B-Raf Proto-Oncogene, Serine/Threonine Kinase
description: A protein involved in signaling inside cells that direct cell growth

name: Dopamine Receptor D2
description: A G protein-coupled receptor that is a primary target for antipsychotic drugs
